final:
module left_shifter(
    input [3:0] a,
    input [1:0] shift_amount,
    output [3:0] result
);
    assign result = a << shift_amount;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      result <= ~a; // Intentionally set result to the bitwise NOT of a
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: result <= ~a; // Intentionally set result to the bitwise NOT of a
